iotsitewise.asset.assethierarchy.CfnAbou: Describes an asset hierarchy that contains a `childAssetId` and `hierarchyLogicalId`.

iotsitewise.asset.assethierarchy.ChildAs.Description: The Id of the child asset.

iotsitewise.asset.assethierarchy.Logical.Description: The `LogicalID` of the hierarchy. This ID is a `hierarchyLogicalId`.  The maximum length is 256 characters, with the pattern `[^u0000-u001Fu007F]+`.
